description: Only play SRS level-down animation on first failure per item in a review session; show static badge on subsequent failures

userStories.title: Track first failure per item in review session
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to track which items have already had their first incorrect answer so the system knows when to suppress the level-down animation and what downgraded stage to display.
acceptanceCriteria: A useRef<Map<number, number>> (item ID → downgraded SRS stage) tracks items that have already had their level-down shown during the current session
When an item receives its first incorrect answer that triggers a level-down, the item ID and its downgraded stage are added to this map
The map is initialized empty at the start of each review session

userStories.title: Show level-down animation only on first failure
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see the SRS level-down animation only the first time I fail an item so that I understand my SRS level dropped, without being shown the same animation repeatedly.
acceptanceCriteria: On the first incorrect answer for an item that crosses an SRS level boundary, the level-down animation plays as before
On subsequent incorrect answers for the same item, pendingLevelDown is NOT set — no shake animation or cross-fade plays
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Display correct static SRS badge on repeated failures
userStories.description: As a user, when I fail an already-failed item again, I want to see my current downgraded SRS level displayed correctly as a static badge.
acceptanceCriteria: getSrsBadge returns a static badge with the downgraded SRS stage for items already in the level-down-shown map
The downgraded stage is consistent with what was shown in the initial level-down animation (computed from original srsStage via calculateSrsStageAfterIncorrect)
The static badge uses the correct color and label for the downgraded level
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
